svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="三层阶梯" id="ladder"> <mxGraphModel dx="-419" dy="-159" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="780" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="l1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="第一层 · H5 Playwright" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="520" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1n" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=12;spacingLeft=12;" value="标准 DOM · headed 可视化 · 调试快
过滤 90% 显性问题:事件没绑、路由 404、校验失效" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="496" x="52" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="第二层 · 运营后台 E2E" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="520" x="100" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2n" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=12;spacingLeft=12;" value="Element Plus · 管理和配置侧旅程
验证「后台改配置 → C 端生效」跨端联动" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="496" x="112" y="238" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="第三层 · 微信小程序 automator" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="520" x="160" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3n" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=12;spacingLeft=12;" value="真实小程序环境 · 启动慢 · 调试难
wx.login + code2session 换 token,裸 input 可 fill" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="496" x="172" y="398" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a1" edge="1" parent="1" source="l1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="l2" value="H5 通过才进"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" edge="1" parent="1" source="l2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="l3" value="后台通过才进"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ban" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" value="禁止跳层
automator 不是首选" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="150" x="600" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
